LOW.title: Great cognitive day
LOW.desc: You're energized and ready. Wizan unlocked all your tasks for today.

MEDIUM.title: Good cognitive day
MEDIUM.desc: You're in solid shape today. Wizan has arranged your tasks efficiently.

HIGH.title: High cognitive load
HIGH.desc: Take it easy today. Only essential tasks are available.

tips.LOW: Great energy! Tackle your hardest tasks first while you're sharp.
tips.MEDIUM: Take a 5-minute break every 45 minutes to maintain focus.
tips.HIGH: Try to keep today's workload light and prioritize rest.

tasks.deadline_past: Deadline cannot be in the past.

regulation.title: Today's Plan
regulation.override_confirm_desc: This task was postponed because your cognitive load may be too high. Proceeding might affect your productivity.
regulation.no_postponed: All tasks are cleared for today! 🎉
